# BBS Flooring

> Premium flooring supplier and installer serving Markham, Toronto, and Durham Region since 2012.

BBS Flooring is a family-owned flooring contractor based in Markham, Ontario. We supply and install hardwood, engineered hardwood, vinyl (LVP/SPC), and laminate flooring. We also offer staircase renovation, hardwood refinishing, carpet removal, and free in-home measurements across the Greater Toronto Area.

## Contact & Location

- **Showroom:** 6061 Highway 7, Unit B, Markham, ON L3P 3B2
- **Phone:** (647) 428-1111
- **Email:** info@bbsflooring.ca
- **Hours:** Mon–Fri 9am–6pm, Sat 10am–5pm
- **Rating:** 4.7★ (41 Google reviews)

## Services

- [Flooring Installation](/installation) — From $1/sqft labour
- [Staircase Renovation](/stairs) — Refinish $125/step, new straight $185/step, specialty $225/step, pickets $25/piece

## Service Areas

Markham, Toronto, Scarborough, Pickering, Ajax, Whitby, Oshawa, Richmond Hill, Vaughan, Stouffville, Aurora, Newmarket, Brampton, Mississauga.

## Key Facts

- 600+ flooring products in stock
- WSIB insured, licensed contractors
- Same-week installation booking available
- Free measurements across the GTA
- Authorized dealer: Vidar, Wickham, Triforest, and more
- Clearance deals from $1.49/sqft
